examples: The Order of the Garter is an ancient order of chivalry.
He has been described as the creature and embodiment of the age of chivalry.
This courtly poetry came out of the idea of chivalry and courtly love that you might associate with knights in shining armor.
Both feminist critique of chivalry and the backlash against it have continued in the century since then.
The disaster call for women and children to evacuate first isn't chivalry, inasmuch as it's evolutionarily smarts.
